query: SELECT i.id, i.productId, i.batch, i.quantity, i.uniqueCode, i.labelCode, i.locationZone, i.status, i.expiryDate, i.tenantId, p.sku, p.description FROM inventory i LEFT JOIN products p ON i.productId = p.id ORDER BY i.id DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 44TTARZqZm4zxSK.b3f2309fec40 --database VPbZo3VRZUT62wWDPHVeqm --execute SELECT i.id, i.productId, i.batch, i.quantity, i.uniqueCode, i.labelCode, i.locationZone, i.status, i.expiryDate, i.tenantId, p.sku, p.description FROM inventory i LEFT JOIN products p ON i.productId = p.id ORDER BY i.id DESC LIMIT 20;
